verdict_reasoning: HSPA5 (BiP/GRP78) is canonically ER-luminal, but has well-documented stress-induced and cancer-cell ecto-display. Under ER stress, hypoxia, viral infection, and oncogenic transformation, BiP translocates to the outer leaflet where it becomes a target for cell-surface-directed therapeutics (antibodies, CAR-T). This ecto-pool is the relevant surface story; BiP qualifies as cell_state_induced via stress and oncogenic contexts.
